notes: Use this file only for sourced monster state-transition probabilities that offline parsing cannot infer.
For a random/conditional follow-up, add monsters.<typeName>.source plus states.<stateId>.followUps entries with stateId, probability, and source.
Combat compilation rejects unsourced probabilities and requires every follow-up distribution to sum to 1.
Unsupported effects remain unsupported; this schema does not override move effects or A10 numbers.
Do not edit generated monster move JSON directly; add sourced transition overrides here instead.
